title: coleus floribundus var. longipes
intro: Coleus floribundus var. longipes, also known as Long-stalked Coleus, is a variety of the coleus plant species, characterized by its long-stemmed, fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Long-stalked Coleus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Indian and Ayurvedic medicine.
